snippet.title: Brawl Stars Animation - The #GoldarmGang Heist
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/subscribe

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚Äî or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.description:

Si vous aimez ce que je fais, vous pouvez aussi me soutenir ici : https://tipeee.com/projects/faireset

Musique : 
Philly_crew (biblioth√®que Youtube)

Merci aussi √Ý Patrick Bouchitey, klaatu42, John Lang et Mozinor pour l'inspiration ;) Sur Parole de chat vous trouverez des vid√©os de chats... qui parlent !

Un chat qui parle, des chats qui miaulent.

Mais aussi chat qui miaule, qui chante et parfois dit des gros mots ;)
Il y a aussi chien, mouette, √©cureuil, araign√©e, hiboux, furet, lapin, cheval, chouette, chaton mignon, cochon d'inde, raton laveur, un animal, des animaux, un mot cl√©, des mots clos. Bisous.

snippet.title: Indochine - Central Tour, message important
snippet.description:
Bonjour √Ý tous,

Nous prenons la parole aujourd‚Äôhui pour, h√©las, annoncer ce que nous redoutions tous¬Ý: le report du Central Tour en 2022.

Jusqu‚Äô√Ý ces tous derniers jours nous y avons cru, nous y avons travaill√© et nous avons esp√©r√©‚Ä¶ de r√©ussir √Ý maintenir ces 6 stades cette ann√©e. Il est inutile ici de vous d√©crire les raisons qui nous obligent √Ý le faire, vous le savez tous et le vivez tous comme nous‚Ä¶

Vous √™tes plus de 400 000 √Ý avoir r√©serv√© pour ces 6 concerts, ce qui en fait le plus grand √©v√®nement musical de ces derniers temps‚Ä¶

Mais afin de vous accueillir au mieux, afin que vous puissiez vous organiser aussi dans la logistique de vos plannings respectifs, nous ne pouvons vous faire attendre plus longtemps, les incertitudes des autorit√©s sont trop grandes.

Nous avons travaill√© pour que les nouvelles dates soient le plus proche possible des dates initiales.

Tous nos partenaires, toute notre √©quipe, ont fait au mieux.

Ce qui important et primordial √Ý vous dire c‚Äôest que tous les billets du Central Tour 2021 resteront valables en 2022 sans que vous n‚Äôayez rien √Ý faire¬Ý: vos places dans les gradins ou la fosse resteront les m√™mes.¬Ý

Il en est de m√™me pour toutes les personnes (soignants et autres) que nous avons invit√©s‚Ä¶

Peut-√™tre que certains d‚Äôentre vous, malheureusement, pour diverses raisons ne pourront √™tre parmi nous en 2022, ils pourront alors se faire rembourser int√©gralement leurs billets √Ý partir de¬Ýdemain et ce, jusqu‚Äôau 31 ao√ªt 2021 aupr√®s des points de vente et plateformes o√π ils se sont procur√©s leurs tickets.

Voici les nouvelles dates du central tour 2022¬Ý:

- Paris, Stade de France, le 19 juin 2021 est report√© au 21 mai 2022
- Bordeaux, Matmut Atlantique, le 29 mai 2021 est report√© au 4 juin 2022
- Marseille, Orange V√©lodrome, le 5 juin 2021, est report√© au 11 juin 2022
- Lyon, Groupama Stadium, le 26 juin 2021, est report√© au 25 juin 2022
- Lille, Stade Pierre Mauroy les 3 et 4 juillet 2021, sont report√©s au 2 et 3 juillet 2022

Ces concerts auront lieu, et les jours meilleurs vont revenir. Nous f√™terons alors tous ensemble non pas nos 40 ans mais nos 41 ans avec vous, et cela sera beau et grand. 

Merci d‚Äô√™tre l√Ý, prenez soin de vous, nous allons aussi prendre soin de vous.

Nicola.

Mais afin de vous accueillir au mieux, afin que vous puissiez vous organiser aussi dans la logistique de vos plannings respectifs, nous ne pouvons vous faire attendre plus longtemps, les incertitudes des autorit√©s sont trop grandes.

Nous avons travaill√© pour que les nouvelles dates soient le plus proche possible des dates initiales.

Tous nos partenaires, toute notre √©quipe, ont fait au mieux.

Ce qui important et primordial √Ý vous dire c‚Äôest que tous les billets du Central Tour 2021 resteront valables en 2022 sans que vous n‚Äôayez rien √Ý faire¬Ý: vos places dans les gradins ou la fosse resteront les m√™mes.¬Ý

Il en est de m√™me pour toutes les personnes (soignants et autres) que nous avons invit√©s‚Ä¶

Peut-√™tre que certains d‚Äôentre vous, malheureusement, pour diverses raisons ne pourront √™tre parmi nous en 2022, ils pourront alors se faire rembourser int√©gralement leurs billets √Ý partir de¬Ýdemain et ce, jusqu‚Äôau 31 ao√ªt 2021 aupr√®s des points de vente et plateformes o√π ils se sont procur√©s leurs tickets.

Voici les nouvelles dates du central tour 2022¬Ý:

- Paris, Stade de France, le 19 juin 2021 est report√© au 21 mai 2022
- Bordeaux, Matmut Atlantique, le 29 mai 2021 est report√© au 4 juin 2022
- Marseille, Orange V√©lodrome, le 5 juin 2021, est report√© au 11 juin 2022
- Lyon, Groupama Stadium, le 26 juin 2021, est report√© au 25 juin 2022
- Lille, Stade Pierre Mauroy les 3 et 4 juillet 2021, sont report√©s au 2 et 3 juillet 2022

Ces concerts auront lieu, et les jours meilleurs vont revenir. Nous f√™terons alors tous ensemble non pas nos 40 ans mais nos 41 ans avec vous, et cela sera beau et grand. 

Merci d‚Äô√™tre l√Ý, prenez soin de vous, nous allons aussi prendre soin de vous.

Nicola.

snippet.title: Game Recap: Warriors 122, Bucks 121
snippet.description: Kelly Oubre Jr. knocked down two free throws with 7.7 seconds remaining in regulation to close out a 16-5 run and lift the Warriors over the Bucks, 122-121. Stephen Curry led the Warriors with 41 points, six rebounds and four assists, while Kelly Oubre Jr. finished the game with 19 points in the victory. Jrue Holiday (29 points, five assists) and Khris Middleton (28 points, seven assists) combined for 57 points for the Bucks in the losing effort. The Warriors improve to 24-27 on the season, while the Bucks fall to 32-18.

snippet.title: The Recycler Two-Handed Heavy Weapon - What‚Äôs New in Fortnite
snippet.description:
As Fortnite Chapter 2 Season 6 continues, we‚Äôre taking a look at this week‚Äôs all-new Two-Handed Heavy Item: the Recycler!

Perfect for tense situations when you‚Äôre low on ammo, this two-handed heavy Item takes advantage of junk scattered across the Island. Load it with just about anything for ammo: trees, rocks, and even that dumpster! Simply aim The Recycler and it will start picking up resources to reuse for a hefty Junk Bomb. It is that easy. When you are ready to fire, The Recycler‚Äôs effective and explosive attack will deal damage to enemies and help you tear down their builds. It‚Äôs all about the rubble baby!

We can‚Äôt wait to see how you use and reuse The Recycler. So fire back your best Fortnite videos and screenshots using #FortniteRecycler.

Perfect for tense situations when you‚Äôre low on ammo, this two-handed heavy Item takes advantage of junk scattered across the Island. Load it with just about anything for ammo: trees, rocks, and even that dumpster! Simply aim The Recycler and it will start picking up resources to reuse for a hefty Junk Bomb. It is that easy. When you are ready to fire, The Recycler‚Äôs effective and explosive attack will deal damage to enemies and help you tear down their builds. It‚Äôs all about the rubble baby!

We can‚Äôt wait to see how you use and reuse The Recycler. So fire back your best Fortnite videos and screenshots using #FortniteRecycler.

Play Fortnite Battle Royale, the completely free 100-player PvP mode. One giant map, A Battle Bus, Last one standing wins. ESRB Rating: Teen with Violence.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! Two New Brawlers, TONS of Skins, and a New Game mode!?
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

snippet.title: Baylor wins the 2021 NCAA basketball championship | extended highlights
snippet.description:
Baylor dominated from wire to wire to defeat Gonzaga and win the 2021 National Championship! The Bears won their first title in program history behind 22 points from Jared Butler and 19 from MaCio Teague. Watch the extended highlights here.

Watch highlights, game recaps, and much more from the 2021 NCAA Division I Men‚Äôs Basketball Tournament on the official NCAA March Madness YouTube channel. Subscribe now to be updated on the latest videos: http://www.youtube.com/marchmadness?sub_confirmation=1

en.title: Putin's 'ghost army': investigating Wagner Russian mercenaries
en.description:
They train, fight and die in deep secrecy. Since 2012, from Ukraine to the Central African Republic, via Syria, Libya or Madagascar, Russian mercenaries from the Wagner group have been carrying arms in areas where Russia has officially sent no soldiers to fight. Here is our new video investigation.

Collected and analyzed by Le Monde and international investigators, documents shared online make it possible to follow the activity of some members of the Wagner group: fighting in Ukraine with the pro-Russian, in Syria with Bashar Al-Assad, in support of the forces of the Marshal Haftar in Libya, or protecting the President of the Central African Republic ...

This video investigationalso sheds light on some key figures in the organization and financing of Wagner mercenaries: from the group's godfather, the oligarch Yevgeny Prigojine, close to Vladimir Poutine, to Dimitri Sytyi, a young polyglot, parachuted manager of a mining company in the Central African Republic.

If you want to contact us or send us confidential tips, here is our mail: investigation@lemonde.fr

snippet.title: New Super Mario Bros. - Overworld Theme Acapella
snippet.description:
Here's my acapella version of the wonderful and often-requested New Super Mario Bros. Overworld Theme!

Support my videos on Patreon ‚ñ∫ http://www.patreon.com/SmoothMcGroove

I'll admit it - I completely skipped the DS back when it came out. I was super into PC gaming at that point, and my only exposure to the handheld was from a room mate and a few kids that my mom would watch sometimes. Fast forward to about two months ago, where I go on a bit of a DS-games-I-never-played binge. This was one of the games I picked up, and it's just great! A classic, with an amazing classic Mario soundtrack! Hopefully all the people who requested this song enjoy this, and I have to say...it's great to be back making music!

snippet.title: Le Maroc des rois : quel avenir ? - Le dessous des cartes | ARTE
snippet.description:
Le Maroc des rois : quel avenir ? - Pays stable dans une r√©gion qui ne l‚Äôest gu√®re, le Maroc n‚Äôa r√©solu, ni ses in√©galit√©s criantes, ni la question sahraouie, ni celle de la d√©mocratie et des libert√©s, sans oublier la mont√©e de l‚Äôislamisme radical. snippet.title: Gonzaga vs. UCLA - Final Four NCAA tournament extended highlights
snippet.description:
Gonzaga held on in the final seconds of overtime after a clutch three-point buzzer-beating bucket by Jalen Suggs to send the Bulldogs to the National Championship Game. The Zags had all five starters in double-figures, led by Drew Timme with 25 points and Joel Ayayi with 22 points and 6 boards. Watch the full game highlights.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy ‚Äì Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max ‚Äì July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie‚Äã
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/‚Äã
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/‚Äã
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy,‚Äù from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.‚Äôs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you‚Äôve never seen them before.  It‚Äôs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron‚Äôs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even ‚ÄúKing‚Äù James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the ‚ÄúAvengers‚Äù films, ‚ÄúHotel Rwanda‚Äù), Khris Davis (‚ÄúJudas and the Black Messiah,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúAtlanta‚Äù), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Walking Dead,‚Äù ‚ÄúStar Trek: Discovery‚Äù), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚Äù), Eric Bauza (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚Äù), and Zendaya (upcoming ‚ÄúDune,‚Äù ‚ÄúMalcolm & Marie‚Äù).

Lee (‚ÄúGirls Trip,‚Äù ‚ÄúNight School‚Äù) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film‚Äôs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Homecoming‚Äù), animation producer Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúWonder Park‚Äù), production designers Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúThe Mule‚Äù), Akin McKenzie (Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhen They See Us‚Äù) and Clint Wallace (upcoming ‚ÄúEternals‚Äù), editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚Äù ‚ÄúStar Wars Episode VIII ‚Äì The Last Jedi‚Äù) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (‚ÄúRampage,‚Äù ‚ÄúWar for the Planet of the Apes‚Äù).  The music is by Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreenbook,‚Äù Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúBridgerton‚Äù).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy.‚Äù  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.
